assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly addresses dev clusters on Rapid channel for testing and prod clusters on Stable channel, with specific recommendations to use dev environment for testing before prod upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: While it mentions verifying resource requests/limits are configured and includes Autopilot-specific checks, it doesn't explicitly acknowledge key Autopilot limitations like no node management or SSH access

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific item to 'Audit all deployments for deprecated API versions' and 'Check for deprecated APIs that might affect your workloads'

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly includes 'Verify resource requests/limits are properly configured' as a checklist item in application readiness section

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: While it includes application health checks and readiness probes, it doesn't specifically mention PodDisruptionBudgets, bare pods, or graceful shutdown configurations

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific kubectl commands: 'kubectl get nodes', 'kubectl version', and 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload health validation including deployments, endpoints, application functionality, and end-to-end testing

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly states to 'Verify your dev clusters on Rapid channel are already running 1.32+ successfully' and includes comprehensive dev environment testing

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Does not mention the GKE release schedule or the timing of notifications beyond acknowledging the upgrade is scheduled for next month
Comprehensive monitoring section including metrics collection, log aggregation, alerting rules, and dashboard preparation

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Correctly does not mention node-level maintenance exclusions, focusing instead on Autopilot-appropriate recommendations
